arts.ttl: Paul Pogba fires cryptic three-word message amid Man United transfer warning
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United midfielder Paul Pogba has been pictured training as he continues his search for a new club.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed new double injury blow before Europa League knockout tie
arts.sum: Manchester United's injury crisis worsens at just the wrong time - the Red Devils head to Spain on Thursday to play Real Sociedad in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Antony's agent hits back at Ruben Amorim after the Man United boss claimed the winger 'struggled a lot' at Old Trafford due to his lack of physicality
arts.sum: Antony 's agent has snapped back at Ruben Amorim after he claimed that the winger struggled in the Premier League due to his lack of physicality.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim leaves FIVE sub spots vacant as Man Utd name threadbare Europa League squad
arts.sum: Manchester United have opted against naming the biggest squad possible for their Europa League clash against Real Sociedad which means they'll be without five substitutes on the bench

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has easy Roy Keane Man United job offer decision to make after brutal comments
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has been on the receiving end of fierce criticism from legendary former Reds midfielder Roy Keane.

arts.ttl: Antony's agent slams Ruben Amorim and highlights deep-rooted problem behind Man Utd's woes
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony has flourished since leaving the club on loan in January and his agent has hit back at recent comments made by head coach Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: ‘Massive step’: Tim Howard says Man Utd would improve so much if they signed £65m England player
arts.sum: Manchester United need wholesale changes in this summer transfer window. Simply put, this season has been a disaster for the Red Devils, they sit 14th...

arts.ttl: “Big black hole that depresses” – Journalist on Manchester United and AC Milan woes being similar
arts.sum: AC Milan are currently in a similar spiral to Manchester United, with both clubs a “big black hole that depresses.” That’s according to journalist Giuseppe Pastore, via Milan News, who has been comparing the two sides during an appearance on Cronache di Spogliatoio. arts.ttl: Man Utd OUT, Chelsea IN: Liverpool face new threat for €50m superstar
arts.sum: Man Utd held a long-standing interest in the Hungary international, but Ben Jacobs reports that they are not expected to pursue a move for Kerkez given that they signed Patrick Dorgu in the January transfer window. The Bournemouth left-back has emerged as one of the Premier League's most sought-after prospects since joining the Cherries in 2023.
